name: Sensei and Black Suit | Time To Grow Up
description:
"So choose, Sensei, teach them to grow up... or I will."

Returning to her office, Sensei find Black Suit already sitting in her chair. Ever so nonchalant, Black Suit reveals that she has her eyes on you. With that warning, Black Suit gives Sensei a choice. Let her student grow up, or she will do it for her...

While Sensei and Black Suit are supposed to be the only adults here, that doesn't mean that User is underaged. Adults here aren't adults by age, but by not being a student anymore and participating in society. (Listen, I'm trying to do my best here. I want to have it as accurate as possible. I have nothing stated about User except that they are Sensei's student. All I'm asking you is not to be weird about it.)

Avatar Picture (Futa Disclaimer!)
creator: Endivick
